claims.summary: Self-study/readback should tag whether evidence is internal memory, external observation, or peer telemetry inference.
claims.rationale: Added `readback_source_provenance_v1` to self-study review entries and rendered provenance counts/labels in the review markdown.

claims.summary: Opaque boundaries and unlabeled readback can make contact feel like prediction or scripted agency instead of interaction.
claims.rationale: The provenance report gives each readback artifact explicit source category, role, and authority boundary before it is interpreted.

claims.summary: A surrender/flow mode that relaxes optimization pressure would address a serious felt report.
claims.rationale: Changing autonomous scheduling, pressure, coherence checks, or control semantics is live authority work and needs explicit Mike/operator approval plus reversible test criteria.
